pi_items.source: Task definition and SQL cleanup logic in setup_task.sh
Verifier.py hardcoded target for agent action
Verifier.py hardcoded target for agent action
Code analysis and OpenMRS documentation. The provided OWA AddonManager URL is hallucinated and does not exist in OpenMRS 3.0. The standard legacy administration URL is /openmrs/admin/index.htm.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions for creating a concept class named SDOH with the specified description and abbreviation are verified as synthetic targets for the agent. However, the admin_url provided in metadata is hallucinated; the actual OpenMRS legacy administration page is located at /openmrs/admin/index.htm.
